name: applyFilters
description: Apply filters to find products. Use this when the user asks for specific products, prices, brands, colors, or categories. IMPORTANT: Use EXACT category names from the available list.

parameters.description: Product category to filter by. MUST be one of these EXACT values: Keyboards, Audio, Power, Mice, T-Shirts, Dresses, Kurtas, Sweatshirts, Leather, Lights & Lighting, Kitchen & Home, Furniture. Use 'Keyboards' for keyboard requests, 'Audio' for headphones/earphones/speakers, 'Mice' for mouse products, 'Power' for chargers/batteries/power banks.
Minimum price in dollars (e.g., 50 for $50 minimum)
Maximum price in dollars (e.g., 100 for under $100)
Brand name to filter by. MUST be one of: AUSK, Samfor, DEELMO, Imsa Moda, NexaFlair, GREGILOOKS, ESSA
Color to filter by. MUST be one of: Black, White, Gray, Red, Blue
Set to true to only show products with free shipping
Minimum star rating from 1 to 5 (e.g., 4 for 4+ stars)
Minimum discount percentage (e.g., 20 for 20% off or more)
Sort results by: price_low (cheapest first), price_high (most expensive first), rating (highest rated), discount (biggest discounts)
